shows.name: Campus Exonerated
shows.desc: "Campus Exonerated" is a captivating broadcast show hosted by the New Jersey Institute of Technology's Pre-Law Society that delves deep into the fascinating world of law, legal cases, and the journey through law school. This enlightening and engaging series is designed to inform, inspire, and entertain both aspiring legal minds and curious viewers.

shows.name: No BS With U
shows.desc: No BS With U is a student-led radio talk show hosted/created by BSU (The Black Student Union) located at NJIT. It’s a show that speaks to the minority community on campus about relevant topics that can affect their day to day lives. It is a show that wants to make you laugh, make you cry (tears of joy) and be real because this is No BS With U.
shows.hosts: DJ Cho, DJ Madi and DJ Birdie

shows.name: A Neat Stew
shows.desc: we will be discussing scientific topics such as how toilets work and why flinstone gummies make you smile more than any other multivitamin on market
